testcase.name: applyLeaveTest

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //button[normalize-space()='Apply']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //button[normalize-space()='Apply']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at
